title: 2x Formamide Loading Dye
author: Haven Himmighoefer
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ks8cwhw

steps.title: Combine Components
steps.instruction: In a 15mL falcon tube, combine 9.5 mLs of Formamide, 330 μLs of deionized water, 50 μLs of 2% Bromophenol Blue, 50 μLs of 1% Xylene Cyanol, 50 μLs of 1% Orange G, and 20 μLs of 0.5 M EDTA.

steps.title: Aliquot and Store
steps.instruction: Aliquot 1 mL in Eppendorf tubes, label 2x, and store in the bottom shelf of the fridge.
